name: Potential Local Port Scan Detected
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
when the context is Local to Local
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 100 destination port within 3 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 100 destination port within 3 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Potential Local Port Scan Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Servers
AND when the context is Local to Local
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 100 destination port within 3 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Potential Local port scan detected
Event description: Single SRC IP querying more than 100 DST ports in 3 minutes.
